metadata.description: Batch 37 — additional Oxford 5000 words 601-700; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: having two parts or functions
words.definitionTh: คู่ / สองส่วน
words.example: The controller has a dual-channel input.

words.definitionEn: to give a film a new soundtrack or name
words.definitionTh: พากย์ / ตั้งฉายา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dub”.

words.definitionEn: not interesting or not bright
words.definitionTh: น่าเบื่อ / ทึบ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dull”.

words.definitionEn: lacking intelligence or unable to speak
words.definitionTh: โง่ / พูดไม่ได้
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dumb”.

words.definitionEn: to leave or throw something in a place
words.definitionTh: ทิ้ง / กองทิ้ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “dump”.

words.definitionEn: two people who perform or work together
words.definitionTh: คู่หูสองคน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “duo”.

words.definitionEn: the length of time something continues
words.definitionTh: ระยะเวลา
words.example: Record the test duration.

words.definitionEn: continually changing or full of energy
words.definitionTh: มีพลัง / เปลี่ยนแปลง
words.example: The dashboard uses dynamic filtering.

words.definitionEn: strongly wanting to do something
words.definitionTh: กระตือรือร้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “eager”.

words.definitionEn: money received from work or investment
words.definitionTh: รายได้
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “earnings”.

words.definitionEn: the absence of difficulty; to reduce pain or difficulty
words.definitionTh: ความง่าย / บรรเทา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ease”.

words.definitionEn: a repeated sound; to repeat or reflect something
words.definitionTh: เสียงสะท้อน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “echo”.

words.definitionEn: relating to the environment and living systems
words.definitionTh: ทางนิเวศวิทยา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ecological”.

words.definitionEn: the study of production, trade, and money
words.definitionTh: เศรษฐศาสตร์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “economics”.

words.definitionEn: a specialist who studies the economy
words.definitionTh: นักเศรษฐศาสตร์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “economist”.

words.definitionEn: relating to an editor or opinion article
words.definitionTh: บทบรรณาธิการ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “editorial”.

words.definitionEn: a person who teaches or develops education
words.definitionTh: นักการศึกษา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “educator”.

words.definitionEn: the degree to which something achieves its goal
words.definitionTh: ประสิทธิผล
words.example: Measure the effectiveness of the solution.

words.definitionEn: the ability to achieve results with little waste
words.definitionTh: ประสิทธิภาพ
words.example: Automation improved line efficiency.

words.definitionEn: in a way that avoids wasted time or resources
words.definitionTh: อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ
words.example: The new model processes images efficiently.

words.definitionEn: a person’s sense of self-importance
words.definitionTh: อัตตา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ego”.

words.definitionEn: having many carefully developed details
words.definitionTh: ประณีต / ละเอียด
words.example: The engineer prepared an elaborate test plan.

words.definitionEn: the joint between the upper and lower arm
words.definitionTh: ข้อศอก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “elbow”.

words.definitionEn: relating to elections
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับการเลือกตั้ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “electoral”.

words.definitionEn: the technology and devices using electronic circuits
words.definitionTh: อิเล็กทรอนิกส์
words.example: Protect the electronics from moisture.

words.definitionEn: graceful and carefully designed
words.definitionTh: สง่างาม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “elegant”.

words.definitionEn: basic or introductory
words.definitionTh: ขั้นพื้นฐาน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “elementary”.

words.definitionEn: to raise something to a higher level
words.definitionTh: ยกระดับ
words.example: Elevate the camera above the conveyor.

words.definitionEn: meeting the conditions to receive or do something
words.definitionTh: มีสิทธิ์
words.example: Only trained staff are eligible to operate the line.

words.definitionEn: to remove completely
words.definitionTh: กำจัด
words.example: The project aims to eliminate manual checks.

words.definitionEn: a select group considered superior
words.definitionTh: ชนชั้นนำ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “elite”.

words.definitionEn: to begin a new project or journey
words.definitionTh: เริ่มดำเนินการ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “embark”.

words.definitionEn: a feeling of shame or awkwardness
words.definitionTh: ความอับอาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “embarrassment”.

words.definitionEn: the official office of an ambassador
words.definitionTh: สถานทูต
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “embassy”.

words.definitionEn: to fix deeply inside or include within something
words.definitionTh: ฝัง / รวมเข้า
words.example: Embed the sensor data in the report.

words.definitionEn: to represent or express an idea or quality
words.definitionTh: เป็นตัวแทน / รวบรวมไว้
words.example: The standard embodies best practice.

words.definitionEn: to accept, support, or hold closely
words.definitionTh: ยอมรับ / โอบกอด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “embrace”.

words.definitionEn: the process of coming into existence
words.definitionTh: การเกิดขึ้น
words.example: The emergence of AI changed inspection.

words.definitionEn: the release of gas, heat, or radiation
words.definitionTh: การปล่อยมลพิษ
words.example: Monitor heat emission from the motor.

words.definitionEn: in a way related to feelings
words.definitionTh: ทางอารมณ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “emotionally”.

words.definitionEn: a group of territories controlled by one ruler
words.definitionTh: จักรวรรดิ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “empire”.

words.definitionEn: based on observation or experiment
words.definitionTh: เชิงประจักษ์
words.example: Use empirical data to set the threshold.

words.definitionEn: to give someone authority or confidence
words.definitionTh: ให้อำนาจ
words.example: The dashboard empowers operators to act quickly.

words.definitionEn: to make a proposal into law
words.definitionTh: ตราเป็นกฎหมาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “enact”.

words.definitionEn: to include a wide range of things
words.definitionTh: ครอบคลุม
words.example: The scope encompasses all product types.

words.definitionEn: support that increases confidence
words.definitionTh: กำลังใจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “encouragement”.

words.definitionEn: giving hope or confidence
words.definitionTh: น่าให้กำลังใจ
words.example: The pilot results are encouraging.

words.definitionEn: a serious attempt to achieve something
words.definitionTh: ความพยายาม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “endeavor”.

words.definitionEn: having no apparent end
words.definitionTh: ไม่มีที่สิ้นสุด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “endless”.

words.definitionEn: to publicly support or approve
words.definitionTh: รับรอง / สนับสนุน
words.example: Management endorsed the automation plan.

words.definitionEn: formal public support or approval
words.definitionTh: การรับรอง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “endorsement”.

words.definitionEn: to continue despite difficulty
words.definitionTh: อดทน
words.example: The camera must endure vibration.

words.definitionEn: to make sure rules are obeyed
words.definitionTh: บังคับใช้
words.example: The PLC enforces the safety interlock.

words.definitionEn: the act of making rules or laws obeyed
words.definitionTh: การบังคับใช้
words.example: Audit the enforcement of the standard.

words.definitionEn: participation, commitment, or a formal agreement
words.definitionTh: การมีส่วนร่วม
words.example: Operator engagement improved adoption.

words.definitionEn: holding attention and interest
words.definitionTh: น่าสนใจ
words.example: Use an engaging dashboard layout.

words.definitionEn: giving pleasure
words.definitionTh: น่าเพลิดเพลิน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “enjoyable”.

words.definitionEn: to improve the quality or value of something
words.definitionTh: เสริมคุณค่า
words.example: Add context to enrich the dataset.

words.definitionEn: to officially register for a course or program
words.definitionTh: ลงทะเบียน
words.example: Enroll operators in the training course.

words.definitionEn: to happen as a result
words.definitionTh: เกิดตามมา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ensue”.

words.definitionEn: a business organization or ambitious project
words.definitionTh: องค์กรธุรกิจ
words.example: The system supports enterprise deployment.

words.definitionEn: providing amusement or enjoyment
words.definitionTh: ให้ความบันเทิง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “entertaining”.

words.definitionEn: a person with strong interest in an activity
words.definitionTh: ผู้ที่ชื่นชอบ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “enthusiast”.

words.definitionEn: to give a right or title
words.definitionTh: ให้สิทธิ์ / ตั้งชื่อ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “entitle”.

words.definitionEn: something that exists as a separate unit
words.definitionTh: หน่วยงาน / สิ่งที่มีอยู่
words.example: Treat each defect as a separate entity.

words.definitionEn: a person who starts and manages a business
words.definitionTh: ผู้ประกอบการ
words.example: The entrepreneur developed a new sensor.

words.definitionEn: a flat paper container for a letter
words.definitionTh: ซองจดหมาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “envelope”.

words.definitionEn: a widespread occurrence of disease
words.definitionTh: โรคระบาด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “epidemic”.

words.definitionEn: the state of having equal rights and opportunities
words.definitionTh: ความเท่าเทียม
words.example: The policy promotes equality at work.

words.definitionEn: a mathematical statement showing equal values
words.definitionTh: สมการ
words.example: Use the equation to calculate storage.

words.definitionEn: to provide the necessary tools or equipment
words.definitionTh: จัดหาอุปกรณ์
words.example: Equip the station with suitable lighting.

words.definitionEn: equal in value, meaning, or effect
words.definitionTh: เทียบเท่า
words.example: The two methods provide equivalent results.

words.definitionEn: a long distinct period of history
words.definitionTh: ยุค
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “era”.

words.definitionEn: to build or raise into an upright position
words.definitionTh: สร้างให้ตั้งขึ้น
words.example: Erect the frame before installation.

words.definitionEn: to burst out suddenly
words.definitionTh: ปะทุ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “erupt”.

words.definitionEn: to become more serious or intense
words.definitionTh: ทวีความรุนแรง
words.example: Escalate the issue if risk remains high.

words.definitionEn: the most important quality or meaning
words.definitionTh: สาระสำคัญ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “essence”.

words.definitionEn: in the most important or basic sense
words.definitionTh: โดยพื้นฐาน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “essentially”.

words.definitionEn: an organization, institution, or process of creating one
words.definitionTh: สถานประกอบการ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “establishment”.

words.definitionEn: lasting forever or for a very long time
words.definitionTh: ชั่วนิรันดร์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “eternal”.

words.definitionEn: a moral principle guiding behavior
words.definitionTh: จริยธรรม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ethic”.

words.definitionEn: relating to a cultural or racial group
words.definitionTh: ทางชาติพันธุ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ethnic”.

words.definitionEn: to move people away from danger
words.definitionTh: อพยพออก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “evacuate”.

words.definitionEn: a systematic judgment of quality or results
words.definitionTh: การประเมิน
words.example: Complete the technical evaluation.

words.definitionEn: clear enough to be easily seen or understood
words.definitionTh: ชัดเจน
words.example: The defect is evident in the image.

words.definitionEn: to bring a feeling or memory to mind
words.definitionTh: กระตุ้นความรู้สึก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “evoke”.

words.definitionEn: gradual development over time
words.definitionTh: วิวัฒนาการ
words.example: Track the evolution of defect patterns.

words.definitionEn: relating to gradual biological or social development
words.definitionTh: ทางวิวัฒนาการ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “evolutionary”.

words.definitionEn: to develop gradually
words.definitionTh: พัฒนา
words.example: The inspection method will evolve over time.

words.definitionEn: to describe something as greater than it is
words.definitionTh: กล่าวเกินจริง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “exaggerate”.

words.definitionEn: to be greater than a limit or amount
words.definitionTh: เกิน
words.example: Do not exceed the pressure limit.

words.definitionEn: the quality of being extremely good
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นเลิศ
words.example: The project supports operational excellence.

words.definitionEn: a case not following a general rule
words.definitionTh: ข้อยกเว้น
words.example: Document every process exception.

words.definitionEn: unusually excellent or rare
words.definitionTh: ยอดเยี่ยมเป็นพิเศษ
words.example: The camera delivered exceptional accuracy.

words.definitionEn: more than what is needed
words.definitionTh: ส่วนเกิน
words.example: Remove excess material before inspection.

words.definitionEn: greater than is reasonable or acceptable
words.definitionTh: มากเกินไป
words.example: Excessive vibration reduces accuracy.

words.definitionEn: to deliberately leave out
words.definitionTh: กันออก
words.example: Exclude invalid samples from analysis.

words.definitionEn: the act of leaving someone or something out
words.definitionTh: การกีดกัน
words.example: Record the reason for data exclusion.

words.definitionEn: limited to one person, group, or item
words.definitionTh: เฉพาะ / พิเศษ
words.example: The supplier granted exclusive access.

words.definitionEn: only and not involving others
words.definitionTh: โดยเฉพาะเท่านั้น
words.example: The test focuses exclusively on stick defects.
